description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run bot that runs on push events to all branches except l10n_* and dependabot/**, and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a 10-minute timeout, testing multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12) in parallel without failing fast. Checkout the code, set up each Python version, download a configuration file from a pastebin, upgrade pip, install wheel and project dependencies, and then start the bot with a test command.
